about.title: 초미세 몬모릴로나이트로 신생아 생존율을 지킵니다
about.desc1: 파보겔(Parvogel)은 초미세 몬모릴로나이트를 주성분으로 하는 경구용 설사 치료 보조제입니다.
about.desc2: 바이러스·세균·원충 감염으로 설사할 때 장 점막 방어막을 빠르게 복구하고 유해물질을 흡착 제거하여 증상을 완화합니다.
about.formVal: 먹이기 좋고 기호성 좋은 겔 타입

features.title:
6가지 이유로 선택받는
파보겔
features.subtitle: 수의사·축산농가·약국 현장의 목소리를 반영해 개발된 차세대 신생아 설사 치료 보조제
features.f1Desc: Broad suppression of major enteritis viruses including rotavirus, coronavirus, and parvovirus
features.f2Desc: Ultra-fine montmorillonite strongly adsorbs intestinal pathogens and viruses, while Bacillus subtilis improves gut environment to boost survival rates
features.f3Desc: Intestinal absorption within 30 minutes of oral administration, significant improvement in diarrhea symptoms within 24 hours
features.f4Desc: Common use for all livestock newborns: calves, piglets, kids, lambs, foals
features.f5Desc: No refrigeration needed, 24-month room temperature storage optimal for farm, pharmacy, and online distribution

clinical.title:
검증된 효과,
논문으로 입증
clinical.subtitle: 국내 유수 대학·연구기관 임상시험에서 확인된 탁월한 치료 효과
clinical.study1Detail: Watery diarrhea stopped within 24 hours of administration, weight gain rate 1.8 times higher than control
clinical.study2Detail: 99.9% reduction in viral shedding, intestinal villi height recovery 3 times faster
clinical.study3Subject: 24 kids, 10 days old; 24 lambs, 10 days old
clinical.study3Detail: Average diarrhea duration 2.3 days (control 6.8 days), 0% mortality rate

tech.title:
일반 벤토나이트와
차원이 다른 기술력
tech.subtitle: Ultra-fine process (LIQI) innovatively improves particle size and specific surface area
tech.tableTitle: LIQI Ultra-fine Process vs Ordinary Bentonite
tech.virusSub: Virus-specific inhibition by DNJ produced by core strain DNG-1000
tech.virusNote: Cited from Korea Agro DNG-1000 related test documents

experts.title:
수의학계 권위자들이
인정한 제품력
experts.subtitle: Evaluated as a scientific digestive disease solution beyond a simple antidiarrheal
experts.e1Role: Virology · Former Head of Quarantine Dept.
experts.e1Quote: Physically adsorbing and removing intestinal viruses (parvo, corona, etc.) is a different league from competing products.
experts.e2Role: Director of Dongjin Animal Hospital · Clinical Specialist
experts.e2Quote: From particle fineness to moisture adsorption and specific surface area — it has all the objective data veterinarians want. Hanwoo farms highly rate its abdominal pain relief and palatability.
experts.farmSub: Dr. Seong-dae Jung of Dongjin Animal Hospital, Parvogel results on Hanwoo farms
experts.f1: Abdominal pain relief & vomiting suppression — immediate colic relief, highest farm satisfaction
experts.f2: Excellent palatability — young calves consume without rejection, minimizing dosing stress
experts.f3: Gastric pH regulation — stabilizes stomach environment beyond simple antidiarrheal, speeding recovery
experts.f4: High repurchase intent — strong trust from farms that felt on-site symptom improvement

target.title: All Livestock Newborns, One Bottle Coverage
target.subtitle: Check major diarrhea pathogens and recommended administration timing by species
target.other: Other livestock (deer, rabbits, ostriches, etc.) can also be applied under veterinary prescription
target.cta: Get Custom Consultation for Your Farm

products.title: Custom Package Sizes by Purpose
products.subtitle: Choose according to farm size and purpose. All with Coupang rocket delivery·Naver Shopping same-day shipping
products.bulk: For bulk purchases (10+ bottles) and wholesale inquiries, please consult separately.

testimonials.title: Veterinarians, Pharmacists, and Farmers Prove It
testimonials.subtitle: Parvogel's capabilities verified at 200+ animal hospitals, pharmacies, and farms nationwide
testimonials.t1Content: I prescribe Parvogel every calf diarrhea season, and over 90% of cases stop diarrhea within 24 hours and recover vitality. Highest farmer satisfaction.
testimonials.t2Content: Emergency administration of 500ml Parvogel to a PED-affected farm reduced mortality from 40% to 8%. Essential recommendation for farm storage due to room temperature storage.
testimonials.t3Content: After entering Coupang and Naver Shopping, repurchase rate is 78%. 100ml small packages are easy for beginner farmers to purchase, 500ml secures full-time farmer regulars.
